entries.source: "Ask me one question that helps me start."
entries.value: "ମୋତେ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିବାରେ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ କରିବା ଏକ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ।"

entries.source: "Do not give the final answer yet. Ask me what I think the first step is."
entries.value: "ଏଯାଏଁ ଶେଷ ଉତ୍ତର ଦିଅନ୍ତୁ ନାହିଁ। ପ୍ରଥମ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ କ’ଣ ଭାବୁଛି ମୋତେ ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ।"

entries.source: "Explain why this step works."
entries.value: "ବୁଝାନ୍ତୁ କାହିଁକି ଏହି ପଦକ୍ଷେପ works."

entries.source: "Give me a hint, not the final answer."
entries.value: "ଶେଷ ଉତ୍ତର ନୁହେଁ, ମୋତେ ଏକ ସଙ୍କେତ ଦିଅନ୍ତୁ।"

entries.source: "Give me a similar problem after I solve this one."
entries.value: "ମୁଁ ଏହା ସମାଧାନ କରିବା ପରେ ସମାନ ସମସ୍ୟା ଦିଅନ୍ତୁ।"

entries.source: "Here is my answer. What misconception does it show?"
entries.value: "ଏହା ମୋ ଉତ୍ତର। ଏହା କେଉଁ ଭୁଲ ଧାରଣା ଦେଖାଉଛି?"

entries.source: "Here is my attempt. What is the smallest hint that would help?"
entries.value: "ଏହା ମୋ ଚେଷ୍ଟା। ସାହାଯ୍ୟ କରିପାରିବା ସବୁଠାରୁ ଛୋଟ ସଙ୍କେତ କ’ଣ?"

entries.source: "Make a similar practice problem after this one."
entries.value: "ଏହା ପରେ ସମାନ ଅଭ୍ୟାସ ସମସ୍ୟା ତିଆରି କରନ୍ତୁ।"

entries.source: "Make me explain the idea back before you continue."
entries.value: "ଆଗକୁ ବଢ଼ିବା ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଧାରଣାଟିକୁ ମୋତେ ପୁଣି ବୁଝାଇବାକୁ କହନ୍ତୁ।"

entries.source: "Quiz me on this topic and wait for my answer."
entries.value: "ଏହି ବିଷୟରେ ମୋତେ କ୍ୱିଜ୍ କରନ୍ତୁ ଏବଂ ମୋ ଉତ୍ତର ପାଇଁ ଅପେକ୍ଷା କରନ୍ତୁ।"

entries.source: "What misconception would lead someone to my wrong answer?"
entries.value: "କେଉଁ ଭୁଲ ଧାରଣା କାହାକୁ ମୋ ଭୁଲ ଉତ୍ତରକୁ ନେଇଯିବ?"

entries.source: A simple test
entries.value: ସରଳ ପରୀକ୍ଷା

entries.source: A strong study loop looks like this:
entries.value: A strong ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ଲୁପ୍ looks like ଏହି:

entries.source: AI can help you learn faster. It can also help you avoid learning entirely.
entries.value: AI ପାରେ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ ଆପଣ ଶିଖନ୍ତୁ faster. ଏହା ପାରେ also ସାହାଯ୍ୟ ଆପଣ ଏଡ଼ାନ୍ତୁ ଶିକ୍ଷା entirely.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI ଟ୍ୟୁଟର୍

entries.source: Ask for a hint. Do not ask for the final answer yet.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ a ସଙ୍କେତ. Do ନୁହେଁ ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ the ଶେଷ ଉତ୍ତର yet.

entries.source: Ask for a small hint.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ a ଛୋଟ ସଙ୍କେତ.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check that step.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ the AI କୁ ଯାଞ୍ଚ ସେହି ପଦକ୍ଷେପ.

entries.source: At the end of a study session, ask yourself three questions:
entries.value: At the end of a ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ଅଧିବେଶନ, ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ yourself ତିନି ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ:

entries.source: Attempt first. Spend three minutes trying without AI.
entries.value: Attempt ପ୍ରଥମ. Spend ତିନି minutes trying ଛଡ଼ା AI.

entries.source: Avoid the copy trap
entries.value: ନକଲ୍ ଫାନ୍ଦକୁ ଏଡ଼ାନ୍ତୁ

entries.source: Build a loop
entries.value: ଏକ ଲୁପ୍ ତିଆରି କରନ୍ତୁ

entries.source: Can I do a new example?
entries.value: ମୁଁ ଏକ ନୂତନ ଉଦାହରଣ କରିପାରିବି କି?

entries.source: Can I explain the idea without looking?
entries.value: ପାରେ I ବୁଝାନ୍ତୁ the ଧାରଣା ଛଡ଼ା looking?

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different flows. Use a homework coach for hints, a math step coach for problem solving, a Socratic tutor for deep understanding, flashcards for recall, and quizzes for pressure-tested practice.
entries.value: ଭିନ୍ନ ଶିକ୍ଷା କାମ ପାଇଁ ଭିନ୍ନ ପ୍ରବାହ ଦରକାର। ସଙ୍କେତ ପାଇଁ ହୋମୱର୍କ କୋଚ୍, ସମସ୍ୟା ସମାଧାନ ପାଇଁ ଗଣିତ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ କୋଚ୍, ଗଭୀର ବୁଝାମଣା ପାଇଁ ସୋକ୍ରାଟିକ୍ ଟ୍ୟୁଟର୍, ସ୍ମରଣ ପାଇଁ ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡ ଓ ଚାପରେ ପରୀକ୍ଷିତ ଅଭ୍ୟାସ ପାଇଁ କ୍ୱିଜ୍ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Do I know what to practice next?
entries.value: ପରେ କ’ଣ ଅଭ୍ୟାସ କରିବା ଜାଣିଛି କି?

entries.source: Explain your move. Tell the AI why you chose the next step.
entries.value: ବୁଝାନ୍ତୁ ଆପଣଙ୍କ move. Tell the AI କାହିଁକି ଆପଣ chose the ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ.

entries.source: Fix the misconception.
entries.value: ଭୁଲ ଧାରଣା ସୁଧାରନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: For writing, that means using Writing Coach to improve a thesis, structure, or paragraph while keeping your voice. For code, it means using Code Tutor to explain errors, ask you to predict output, and help you debug rather than pasting a complete solution. For exams, it means using Exam Prep Planner to decide what to review first and how to test yourself.
entries.value: ପାଇଁ ଲେଖନ, ସେହି means using ଲେଖନ କୋଚ୍ କୁ improve a thesis, structure, କିମ୍ବା paragraph while keeping ଆପଣଙ୍କ voice. ପାଇଁ କୋଡ୍, ଏହା means using କୋଡ୍ ଟ୍ୟୁଟର୍ କୁ ବୁଝାନ୍ତୁ errors, ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ଆପଣ କୁ predict output, ଓ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ ଆପଣ debug rather than pasting a complete solution. ପାଇଁ exams, ଏହା means using ପରୀକ୍ଷା ପ୍ରସ୍ତୁତି ଯୋଜକ କୁ decide କ’ଣ କୁ ସମୀକ୍ଷା ପ୍ରଥମ ଓ କିପରି କୁ test yourself.

entries.source: Good prompts for honest studying
entries.value: ସତ୍ୟନିଷ୍ଠ ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ପାଇଁ ଭଲ ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ

entries.source: Here is a slightly stronger version you can reuse:
entries.value: Here ହେଉଛି a slightly ଅଧିକ ଶକ୍ତିଶାଳୀ version ଆପଣ ପାରେ reuse:

entries.source: How to study with AI without cheating yourself
entries.value: କିପରି କୁ ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ସହିତ AI ନକଲ୍ ଛଡ଼ା yourself

entries.source: If the answer is yes, AI helped you study. If the answer is no, the next move is not more reading. It is active practice. Open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, or the AI learning prompt library and turn the topic into a task you have to attempt.
entries.value: Answer “ହଁ” ହେଲେ AI ଆପଣଙ୍କୁ study କରିବାରେ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ କଲା। Answer “ନା” ହେଲେ ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ move ଆଉ ଅଧିକ reading ନୁହେଁ; ଏହା active practice। Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction କିମ୍ବା AI learning prompt library ଖୋଲନ୍ତୁ ଏବଂ topic କୁ ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରିବାକୁ ପଡ଼ିବା task ରେ ପରିଣତ କରନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: If the work is homework, start in Homework Coach. If it is math, use Math Step Coach and ask it to check one step at a time. If you are trying to understand a concept deeply, use Socratic Instruction and answer the questions before asking for a summary.
entries.value: କାମଟି homework ହେଲେ Homework Coach ରୁ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରନ୍ତୁ। Math ହେଲେ Math Step Coach ବ୍ୟବହାର କରନ୍ତୁ ଏବଂ ଏକେକ step check କରିବାକୁ କହନ୍ତୁ। Concept କୁ ଗଭୀରରେ ବୁଝିବାକୁ ଚାହୁଁଥିଲେ Socratic Instruction ବ୍ୟବହାର କରନ୍ତୁ ଏବଂ summary ମାଗିବା ପୂର୍ବରୁ questions ର answer ଦିଅନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: If you paste a homework question and copy the final answer, you may finish the task, but you have not built the skill. If you ask for a hint, explain your thinking, compare your answer, and try a similar problem, AI becomes a study partner instead of a shortcut.
entries.value: ଆପଣ homework ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ paste କରି final answer copy କଲେ task ଶେଷ ହୋଇପାରେ, କିନ୍ତୁ skill ଗଢ଼ାଯାଏ ନାହିଁ। ଆପଣ hint ମାଗିଲେ, ନିଜ thinking ବୁଝାଇଲେ, ନିଜ answer compare କଲେ, ଏବଂ ସମାନ problem ଚେଷ୍ଟା କଲେ AI shortcut ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତେ study partner ହୋଇଯାଏ।

entries.source: Practice a new version.
entries.value: ନୂଆ ଭାର୍ସନ୍ ଅଭ୍ୟାସ କରନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Practice transfer. Ask for a similar problem with different numbers, wording, or context.
entries.value: ଅଭ୍ୟାସ transfer. ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ a similar ସମସ୍ୟା ସହିତ different numbers, wording, କିମ୍ବା context.

entries.source: Recall later. Turn the weak spot into a card in Flashcard Builder or a short quiz in Quiz Me On Trivia.
entries.value: ସ୍ମରଣ later. Turn the ଦୁର୍ବଳ ସ୍ଥାନ into a card ରେ ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡ ବିଲ୍ଡର୍ କିମ୍ବା a short କ୍ୱିଜ୍ ରେ କ୍ୱିଜ୍ Me ଉପରେ Trivia.

entries.source: Request diagnosis. Ask what your answer reveals about your understanding.
entries.value: Request diagnosis. ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ କ’ଣ ଆପଣଙ୍କ ଉତ୍ତର reveals ବିଷୟରେ ଆପଣଙ୍କ understanding.

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ skills

entries.source: Studying with AI works best when the tool keeps you in the driver's seat.
entries.value: Studying ସହିତ AI works best କେବେ the ଉପକରଣ keeps ଆପଣ ରେ the driver's seat.

entries.source: That is a warning sign. Recognition is not recall. Reading a clear explanation is not the same as being able to solve a new problem, write a paragraph, or answer a question under pressure.
entries.value: ସେହିଟା warning sign। Recognition recall ନୁହେଁ। ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ explanation ପଢ଼ିବା, ନୂଆ problem ସମାଧାନ କରିପାରିବା, paragraph ଲେଖିପାରିବା, କିମ୍ବା pressure ରେ question answer କରିପାରିବା ସହ ସମାନ ନୁହେଁ।

entries.source: That loop is slower than copying, but it is much faster than staying confused.
entries.value: ସେହି loop ହେଉଛି slower than copying, but ଏହା ହେଉଛି much faster than staying confused.

entries.source: The copy trap is subtle. It does not always feel like cheating. Sometimes it feels like being efficient. The AI explains something beautifully, you nod along, and then you move on. Ten minutes later you cannot reproduce the idea without the answer in front of you.
entries.value: The copy trap ହେଉଛି subtle. ଏହା does ନୁହେଁ always feel like cheating. Sometimes ଏହା feels like being efficient. The AI explains something beautifully, ଆପଣ nod along, ଓ then ଆପଣ move ଉପରେ. Ten minutes later ଆପଣ cannot reproduce the ଧାରଣା ଛଡ଼ା the ଉତ୍ତର ରେ front of ଆପଣ.

entries.source: The difference is how you use it.
entries.value: ଫରକ୍ ହେଉଛି ଆପଣ ଏହାକୁ କିପରି ବ୍ୟବହାର କରନ୍ତି।

entries.source: The question is not whether AI should be part of studying. For many learners it already is. The better question is whether the tool is helping you build memory, judgment, and confidence, or quietly removing the exact struggle that makes learning stick.
entries.value: ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ ଏହା ନୁହେଁ ଯେ AI ଅଧ୍ୟୟନର ଅଂଶ ହେବା ଉଚିତ କି ନାହିଁ। ଅନେକ ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ ଏହା ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଅଂଶ ହୋଇଛି। ଭଲ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ ହେଉଛି ଉପକରଣଟି ଆପଣଙ୍କୁ memory, judgment ଓ confidence ଗଢ଼ିବାରେ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ କରୁଛି କି, ନା ଶିକ୍ଷାକୁ ଟିକେଇ ରଖୁଥିବା ଆବଶ୍ୟକ struggle କୁ ଶାନ୍ତଭାବେ ହଟାଇଦେଉଛି।

entries.source: The transfer step is the key. If you can only solve the exact problem the AI just walked through, you have learned the example. If you can solve a cousin of the problem, you are starting to learn the idea.
entries.value: Transfer step ହେଉଛି ମୁଖ୍ୟ କଥା। AI ଯେ exact problem ଦେଖାଇଲା, ଆପଣ କେବଳ ସେହିଟି ସମାଧାନ କରିପାରିଲେ, ଆପଣ example ଶିଖିଛନ୍ତି। ସେହି problem ର cousin ସମାଧାନ କରିପାରିଲେ, ଆପଣ idea ଶିଖିବା ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିଛନ୍ତି।

entries.source: These are not magic words. They are guardrails. They keep the conversation focused on thinking instead of answer collection.
entries.value: ଏହିଗୁଡିକ ହେଉଛି ନୁହେଁ magic words. ସେମାନେ ହେଉଛି guardrails. ସେମାନେ keep the conversation କେନ୍ଦ୍ରିତ ଉପରେ thinking instead of ଉତ୍ତର collection.

entries.source: These prompts keep you active. They make the AI support your reasoning rather than replace it.
entries.value: ଏହିଗୁଡିକ ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ keep ଆପଣ active. ସେମାନେ ତିଆରି the AI ସହାୟତା ଆପଣଙ୍କ reasoning rather than replace ଏହା.

entries.source: Try prompts like these:
entries.value: ଏମିତି ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରନ୍ତୁ:

entries.source: Try the problem yourself.
entries.value: ସମସ୍ୟାଟି ନିଜେ ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Use AI as a coach for understanding, practice, and feedback instead of a shortcut that quietly removes the learning.
entries.value: ବ୍ୟବହାର AI as a coach ପାଇଁ understanding, ଅଭ୍ୟାସ, ଓ ମତାମତ instead of a shortcut ସେହି quietly removes the ଶିକ୍ଷା.

entries.source: Use AI for the thinking around the answer
entries.value: ବ୍ୟବହାର AI ପାଇଁ the thinking around the ଉତ୍ତର

entries.source: Use prompts that make the AI slow down:
entries.value: ବ୍ୟବହାର ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ ସେହି ତିଆରି the AI slow down:

entries.source: Use the right mode
entries.value: ଠିକ୍ ମୋଡ୍ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରନ୍ତୁ

entries.source: Use this rule: after any AI explanation, close the loop with output from your own mind. Write the idea back. Solve a fresh version. Make a flashcard. Teach it to an imaginary younger student. Ask for a quiz. The more the session asks you to produce, the less likely you are to fool yourself.
entries.value: ଏହି rule ବ୍ୟବହାର କରନ୍ତୁ: କୌଣସି AI explanation ପରେ, ନିଜ ମନର output ସହ loop ବନ୍ଦ କରନ୍ତୁ। Idea କୁ ପୁଣି ଲେଖନ୍ତୁ। Fresh version ସମାଧାନ କରନ୍ତୁ। Flashcard ତିଆରି କରନ୍ତୁ। କଳ୍ପିତ ଛୋଟ student କୁ ଶିଖାନ୍ତୁ। Quiz ମାଗନ୍ତୁ। Session ଆପଣଙ୍କୁ produce କରିବାକୁ ଯେତେ ଅଧିକ କହେ, ନିଜକୁ ଭୁଲ ବିଶ୍ୱାସ କରିବା ସମ୍ଭାବନା ସେତେ କମ୍।

entries.source: Write your next step.
entries.value: ଆପଣଙ୍କ ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ଲେଖନ୍ତୁ।
